## Verification

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] Relevant Rust tests
- [ ] Relevant clippy checks
- [ ] Packaged-app smoke test, if desktop/runtime behavior changed

## Public Hygiene

- [ ] No provider credentials, local auth config, real `.mdreview` workspace data, or personal absolute paths added
- [ ] Fixtures are synthetic or sanitized
